<!-- See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full pull-request requirements. -->

## Summary

Describe the change and the research question or problem it addresses.

## Type of change

- [ ] Experiment or benchmark
- [ ] Kernel (Triton / CUDA / CUTLASS)
- [ ] Harness / infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Scope

Keep the change focused. List what is intentionally out of scope.

## Correctness evidence

- [ ] Reference comparison
- [ ] Tolerance rationale stated
- [ ] Shape and dtype coverage
- [ ] NaN / infinity behavior checked (kernels)

## Performance claims

If this PR makes a performance claim, state the baseline, workload, hardware,
software stack, repetitions, and uncertainty. Attach profiler evidence.

- [ ] No performance claim, or
- [ ] Baseline, workload, hardware, and software stack documented
- [ ] Repetitions and uncertainty reported
- [ ] Profiler evidence attached

## Reproduction

```bash
# Exact command from a clean checkout
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Type hints for Python code
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Limitations stated
- [ ] No employer-confidential material (code, data, traces, identifiers)
